narrative:
Hamilton Twp R (precinct in Warren County) has 1,183 registered voters, with 48.5% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 42.8% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 8.7%, a pronounced Republican lean of 34.1 percentage points.
